headline: Wolfe Research Upgrades NRG Energy to Outperform, Announces $190 Price Target
summary: Wolfe Research  analyst Steve Fleishman   upgrades NRG Energy (NYSE:NRG) from Peer Perform to Outperform and announces $190 price target.
